headline: US/ECUADOR TEAM UP
caption: The United States and Ecuador are preparing joint operations targeting powerful drug gangs behind a surge of violence across the country. U.S. forces have been deployed, but will NOT participate in the missions, and instead only provide intelligence, surveillance and logistical support while Ecuadorian forces carry out the raids tied to cocaine shipments moving through Ecuador’s ports.

headline: IRAN SHUTS STRAIT OF HORMUZ
caption: The war between the U.S., Israel and Iran has severely disrupted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global trade route, leaving thousands of oil tankers and cargo vessels stranded. Iran says it has shut the narrow waterway and warned it will attack any ships attempting to pass through it.

headline: SENATE VOTES AGAINST ENDING IRAN WAR
caption: Senate Republicans blocked an effort to halt Trump’s war with Iran, effectively backing the early stages of a conflict that has spread quickly across the Middle East while leaving the United States without a clear path for disengagement.

headline: FRANCE EXPANDS NUCLEAR ARSENAL
caption:
“Macron’s plan expands France’s nuclear arsenal, ends public disclosure of total stockpile numbers, permits temporary forward-basing of nuclear forces in allied European states, and deepens deterrence cooperation with partners.”
— Atlantic Council

headline: US SINKS IRANIAN WARSHIP & NATO DESTROYS MISSILE HEADED FOR TURKEY
caption: A U.S. submarine sank an Iranian warship near Sri Lanka, killing at least 80 people, while NATO air defenses intercepted and destroyed an Iranian ballistic missile launched toward Turkey.

headline: TALARICO WINS DEM NOMINATION
caption: Texas state Rep. James Talarico has won the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in Texas. He will face the Republican nominee in November in a race that could become one of the most closely watched Senate contests of 2026.
